bio1.en: I'm a backend developer passionate about designing scalable, high-performance systems. With deep expertise in Java ecosystem and Spring Boot, I build microservices that power modern enterprise applications.
bio1.zh: 我是一名后端开发者，热衷于设计可扩展、高性能的系统。在 Java 生态和 Spring Boot 方面有深厚的专业知识，构建驱动现代企业应用的微服务。

bio2.en: Currently diving into the world of Large Language Models, exploring how AI agents can transform traditional backend architectures. I believe the future of software lies at the intersection of robust engineering and intelligent automation.
bio2.zh: 目前正在深入研究大语言模型，探索 AI Agent 如何转型传统后端架构。我相信软件的未来在于健壮工程与智能自动化的交汇点。

bio3.en: Open to discussing microservice architecture, LLM applications, and all things backend. Let's build something great together.
bio3.zh: 欢迎讨论微服务架构、LLM 应用以及所有后端相关话题。让我们一起构建伟大的东西。
